bead.title: contract: prove auto-routing and fiz models share one enriched snapshot
bead.description:
CONTEXT
SD-005 closes only when `fiz models`, root `ListModels`, `ResolveRoute`, `RouteStatus`, and `Execute` all consume one unified enriched available-model snapshot. Earlier beads add snapshot identity, service assembly, routing consumption, status/evidence consumption, score evidence naming, and legacy cleanup. This bead is the final contract gate that proves the whole stack agrees.

CHANGE
Add a focused contract test suite using fixture OpenAI-compatible endpoints and cache data. The suite should show that the model rows visible through `fiz models --json` are the rows ResolveRoute/RouteStatus/Execute use for candidate selection and evidence. Include stale-while-revalidate and force-refresh behavior where practical without real credentials.

IN-SCOPE FILES
- service integration/contract tests in root package
- agentcli models/routing tests
- internal/modelregistry fixture helpers if needed
- documentation notes only if a test cannot be made deterministic

OUT-OF-SCOPE
- Real paid provider sweeps.
- New public routing fields not already required by SD-005/CONTRACT-003.
- Large benchmark changes.
bead.acceptance:
1. `go test . -run "TestAutoRoutingUsesUnifiedModelSnapshot|TestExecuteRouteEvidenceMatchesModelsSnapshot|TestRouteStatusMatchesModelsSnapshot" -count=1` passes, or equivalently named new contract tests pass.
2. `go test ./agentcli -run "TestModels.*Snapshot|TestCLI.*ResolveRoute|TestCLI_ListModels" -count=1` passes.
3. `go test ./internal/modelregistry/... ./internal/routing/... ./agentcli/... . -count=1` passes.
4. Contract tests prove selected and rejected route candidates can be matched to `fiz models --json` rows by provider, model, endpoint, and server_instance, including runtime quota/latency and typed filter reasons.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit --all-files` passes, or any failure is documented as unrelated existing state in bead notes.
